title: Explorer's Pack
description: A modpack dedicated to players who enjoy exploring and adventuring.
body:
# Explorer's Pack

Explorer's Pack is a modpack designed to give the player as many incentives to explore the world as possible!

- Breath-taking visuals wherever you go thanks to Distant Horizons and Photon Shaders, with PBR textures all around you!
- Immersive ambients thanks to Particular, Dynamic Surroundings, Sound Physics Remastered, Dynamic Lights, Reactive Music, and Presence Footsteps!
- More friends, thanks to Critters and Companions, Ecologics, Naturalist, and Ribbits!
- More useful friends, thanks to Chested Companions, Companion, and Spawn-Proof Villagers!
- More foes, thanks to Creeper Overhaul, Illager Invasion, Tiny Skeletons, and Variants & Ventures!
- More fighting options, thanks to Simply Swords, Simply More, Wizards, Jewelry, Better Combat, and Better Deep Dark!
- More exploration destinations, thanks to YUNG's wide range of mods, Dungeons and Taverns (plus add-ons), Towns and Towers, Repurposed Structures, Better Archeology, Tectonic, Terralith, and obviously TerraBlender!
- More exploration options, thanks to Journeymap, Waystones, Sophisticated Backpacks, Comforts, Bountiful, Farmer's Delight, Nether's Delights, Traveler's Titles, Gazebos, and Infinite Dimensions (make sure to bring an End Crystal)!
- More settlement options, thanks to a multitude of furniture mods, including Additional Lanterns, Another Furniture, Convenient Decor, Decorative Blocks, Diagonal Fences, Walls and Windows, Handcrafted, and Macaw's multitude of mods!
- Building contraptions with Create, Applied Energistics 2 and Energized Power!
- Easily identifiable informations, thanks to EMI (alongside JEI, EMI Enchanting and EMIffect), Your Reputation, Jade, and Enchantment Descriptions!
- Enjoy this modpack with back-ported features like the Pale Garden and the Happy Ghasts!
- Useful QoL mods, like Dynamic Crosshair, Double Doors, Carry On, Controlify, Trading Post, Simple HUD Enhanced, Better Advancements, and many more!

# Server

For server-side releases, see [https://github.com/EssGeeEich/ExplorersPackMC/releases](https://github.com/EssGeeEich/ExplorersPackMC/releases)
